mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.POST_SN, b.POST_SJ, b.POST_CN, b.WRTR_USER_ID, b.INQ_CNT, b.REG_DT, b.MDFCN_DT, d.DATA_CTG, d.EXPS_ORD, d.ACCS_LMT_CD, c1.COM_CD_NM AS DATA_CTG_NM, c2.COM_CD_NM AS ACCS_LMT_NM FROM BOARD b JOIN DATA_ROOM d ON b.POST_SN = d.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.COM_CD = d.DATA_CTG AND c1.CL_CODE = '106' LEFT JOIN COM_CD c2 ON c2.COM_CD = d.ACCS_LMT_CD AND c2.CL_CODE = '107'
ORDER BY b.REG_DT DESC ) OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD b JOIN DATA_ROOM d ON b.POST_SN = d.POST_SN

SELECT b.POST_SN, b.POST_SJ, b.POST_CN, b.WRTR_USER_ID, b.INQ_CNT, b.REG_DT, b.MDFCN_DT, d.DATA_CTG, d.EXPS_ORD, d.ACCS_LMT_CD, c1.COM_CD_NM AS DATA_CTG_NM, c2.COM_CD_NM AS ACCS_LMT_NM FROM BOARD b JOIN DATA_ROOM d ON b.POST_SN = d.POST_SN LEFT JOIN COM_CD c1 ON c1.COM_CD = d.DATA_CTG AND c1.CL_CODE = '106' LEFT JOIN COM_CD c2 ON c2.COM_CD = d.ACCS_LMT_CD AND c2.CL_CODE = '107' WHERE b.POST_SN = #{postSn}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO BOARD ( POST_SN, WRTR_USER_ID, BOARD_TYPE_CD, POST_SJ, POST_CN, INQ_CNT, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( "TEAM1_202512AF"."ISEQ$$_433495".nextval, #{wrtrUserId}, '04', #{postSj}, #{postCn}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
SELECT "TEAM1_202512AF"."ISEQ$$_433495".currval FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO DATA_ROOM ( POST_SN, DATA_CTG, EXPS_ORD, ACCS_LMT_CD ) VALUES ( #{postSn}, #{dataCtg}, #{expsOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{accsLmtCd} )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET POST_SJ = #{postSj}, POST_CN = #{postCn}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{wrtrUserId}, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE POST_SN = #{postSn}
